nodes.label: Operational Guardrails
nodes.rationale: Technology choices must account for operations, restore ownership, correction workflows, audit preservation, migrations, tests, backups, and long-term maintenance rather than favoring a framework first.

nodes.label: Data Architecture Guardrails
nodes.rationale: The data design should model domain behavior, transaction rules, auditability, migrations, and backup expectations before finalizing tables or database technology.

nodes.label: Observability Guardrails
nodes.rationale: Operational design must keep business truth separate from runtime logs, protect sensitive data, test restore paths, and avoid heavy tooling unless the risk profile justifies it.

nodes.label: System Interaction Guardrails
nodes.rationale: Interaction architecture should place business rules outside UI components, define side effects and audit records before endpoint shape, and avoid distributed services before operational need is clear.

nodes.label: Architecture Research Options Markdown Brief
nodes.rationale: Editable source-of-truth research brief for the BodyLife CRM v1 architecture shortlist.

nodes.label: Architecture Research Options HTML Preview
nodes.rationale: Rendered companion view that links back to the Markdown source.

nodes.label: BodyLife CRM V1
nodes.rationale: V1 replaces paper and partial Excel accounting for clients, memberships, visits, cash payments, freezes, history, and daily reporting.

nodes.label: Recommended V1 Architecture
nodes.rationale: Shortlist favors modular monolith, hybrid server-rendered UI, separate business audit, and no v1 migration/offline-first.

nodes.label: Hybrid Server-Rendered UI
nodes.rationale: Server-rendered pages with interactive search, quick actions, and warnings for reception UX.

nodes.label: Business Audit History
nodes.rationale: Separate append-only business history for disputes.

nodes.label: Membership Domain Model
nodes.rationale: Largest domain risk is membership rules, frequent negative visits, and explaining how negatives were closed.

nodes.label: Negative Visits
nodes.rationale: Negative balance is a core workflow, not an edge case.
